histogram.name: AccessibilityAnnotator.AccessibilityQueryService.ProviderResultCount.{MemoryDataProvider}
histogram.summary: Records the number of search results returned by the {MemoryDataProvider}. Recorded when the accessibility query service finishes retrieving data from a provider.

histogram.name: AccessibilityAnnotator.ContentAnnotator.DependentInformationMissing
histogram.summary: Records when a page is missing the dependent information required to annotate it. This is ONLY recorded when there is missing information.

histogram.name: AccessibilityAnnotator.DirectServerProvider.EntityCount
histogram.summary: Number of annotations retrieved from sync bridge that were converted to entities for service. Recorded when GetEntities is called on the DirectServerEntityProvider.

histogram.name: AccessibilityAnnotator.DirectServerProvider.GetEntitiesLatency
histogram.summary: Duration of the GetEntities method in the DirectServerEntityProvider. Recorded when GetEntities is called.

histogram.name: AccessibilityAnnotator.FullAnnotationReached
histogram.summary: Records whether a page would move onto full annotation in the AccessibilityAnnotator pipeline. Recorded when a page has undergone evaluation for annotation, which happens when a page is loaded and sufficient data (content, language, sensitivity score) has been gathered and all classifier checks have completed.

histogram.name: AccessibilityAnnotator.LanguageCheck
histogram.summary: Records whether the page language is a target language for the pipeline. Recorded when a page is undergoing evaluation for annotation, which happens when a page is loaded and sufficient data (content, language, sensitivity score) has been gathered.

histogram.name: AccessibilityAnnotator.RemoteAnnotatorInfo
histogram.summary: Records the user interaction with the Accessibility Annotator info dialog. Recorded when the info dialog is shown to the user, and when the user accepts or dismisses it.

histogram.name: AccessibilityAnnotator.SensitivityCheck
histogram.summary: Records whether the page passed the sensitivity check. Recorded when a page is undergoing evaluation for annotation, which happens when a page is loaded and sufficient data (content, language, sensitivity score) has been gathered.

histogram.name: AccessibilityAnnotator.{ValueClassifierType}ClassifierDuration
histogram.summary: The time taken to run the {ValueClassifierType} value classifier. Recorded when a page is undergoing evaluation for annotation and runs through the {ValueClassifierType} classifier, which happens when a page is loaded and sufficient data (content, language, sensitivity score) has been gathered.

histogram.name: AccessibilityAnnotator.{ValueClassifierType}ClassifierResult
histogram.summary: Records whether a page passed the {ValueClassifierType} value classifier check, and what it is labeled as (if applicable). Recorded when a page is undergoing evaluation for annotation and went through the {ValueClassifierType} classifier, which happens when a page is loaded and sufficient data (content, language, sensitivity score) has been gathered.
